description: This smooth, rich wine is young but already creamy. It has plenty of acidity woven into its lemon and pear fruitiness, accented with hints of honey. It comes from vines planted in 1929 in Preignac, within the Sauternes appellation, but is a dry Bordeaux Blanc.
title: Clos des Justices 2016 Pure Old Vines  (Bordeaux Blanc)

description: Delicate watermelon aromas and canteloupe flavors lend a bit of fruitiness to this pink-colored, light-bodied and lean-textured wine made from Grenache and Counoise.
title: Rock Wall 2016 Uncle Roget's Rosé (Yolo County)

description: The aromas are bright, with notes of pear, melon and apple. The palate brings dry ale flavors that taper toward the finish.
title: Telaya 2016 Grenache Blanc (Yakima Valley)

description: Delicate wet slate aromas meet wafts of rose blossom and baseball-card bubblegum on the nose of this rosé. The palate offers delicious and approachable strawberry flavors, held together with a steely edge.
title: Koehler 2016 Rosé of Grenache (Santa Ynez Valley)

description: Light, bright and with lively acidity, this is already a juicy, delicious wine. It offers good fruitiness, with pink grapefruit flavors and a tangy, zesty aftertaste. Drink now.
title: Château Merlet 2016  Bordeaux Blanc

description: Subtly delicious flavors merge with a creamy, luxurious texture in this deceptively light-bodied and graceful wine blended from Marsanne, Roussanne and Viognier. It starts with butter and almond aromas then doles out light marzipan and vanilla flavors. While rich in mouthfeel, it has enough crispness for balance.
title: Kivelstadt Cellars 2016 Mother of Invention White (Sierra Foothills)

description: Leafy, fresh herb aromas and tangy, reserved jicama and kiwi flavors make this dry, unoaked wine a delight to drink. It has vivid acidity, light body and a fresh, lingerirg finish.
title: Klinker Brick 2016 Grenache Blanc (Lodi)

description: Aromas of melon, pear and candied apple lead to medium-bodied fleshy-feeling fruit flavors. It brings a pleasing sense of acidity—a delightful white.
title: Chateau Ste. Michelle 2016 Pinot Gris (Columbia Valley (WA))

description: A pale pink in the glass, this light and clean bottling shows aromas of chalk, pink flowers, watermelon and a slice of lime. It's crisp on the sip with a tight texture, offering a very quaffable bubblegum flavor.
title: Rabble 2016 Mossfire Ranch Rosé (Paso Robles)

description: This bone-dry, steely-textured wine is crisp and bracing due to firm acidity, fruity-but-not-sweet flavors and maybe a touch of tannin that adds to the firm mouthfeel. Like a squeeze of lemon on the pan-roasted fish, it will make a great counterpoint to lots of things on the menu.
title: Dutton-Goldfield 2016 Chileno Valley Vineyard Riesling (Marin County)

description: A mix of yeast and citrus zest creates a nose that is fresh and creamy at once. The palate has an earthier touch, emphasizing salty yeast more than juicy fruit, but the citrus freshness stays throughout. This is juicy and refreshing with a savory fillip at the end.
title: Weszeli 2016 Steingarten Grüner Veltliner (Kamptal)

description: Passion fruit and pea shoots mingle easily on the nose of this medium-bodied wine. This is a fully dry and somewhat austere Marlborough Sauvignon Blanc, ending on notes of white grapefruit and hints of underripe stone fruit.
title: Esk Valley 2016 Sauvignon Blanc (Marlborough)

description: Heady exotic fruit, tomato vine and chopped herb aromas jump out of the glass. On the generous, savory palate, tangy acidity balances white peach, honeydew melon and juicy grapefruit flavors.
title: Tenuta Luisa 2016 Sauvignon (Isonzo del Friuli)

description: Fresh notes of nettle, lemon and green pear appear on the nose. These crisp, fresh flavors are even more present on the light but textured palate that offers substance despite the slenderness. Friendly notes of lemon throughout make this restrained Sauvignon Blanc hugely appetizing.
title: Wohlmuth 2016 Kitzecker Sauvignon Blanc (Südsteiermark)

description: Spicy notes of miso and yeast appear first on the nose. The palate, full with vivid spritz, amplifies them even more. Bright lemon notes provide freshness, createing a lively, almost warming but still refreshing Grüner that is all about total savoriness, spice and verve.
title: Fischer 2016 Ried Zanzl Federspiel Grüner Veltliner (Wachau)

description: A fresh nose of green and yellow citrus still shows a touch of yeast, while the palate offers Riesling tartness and slenderness. Taut and fresh with tart lemon flavors swishing across the palate, it's helped along with a fine, slight touch of spritz. The finish is dry, brisk and very refreshing.
title: Mayer am Pfarrplatz 2016 Alsegg Riesling (Vienna)

description: Light and ethereal on the nose, this wine develops body and complexity on the palate, a mix of flavors defined by rose petal and strawberry-hull earthiness. Lengthy in acidity, it remains fresh and inviting in the glass and a good accompaniment to a meal.
title: Mira 2016 Rosé of Pinot Noir (Carneros)

description: Light pink in color with a slight yellowish orange hue, this delicate bottling shows light plum and strawberry on the nose along with a prominent chalky character. The sip's balanced acidity and steely, gunmetal minerality carry flavors of red cherry, berry and plum, and it remains zesty long after opening.
title: Sanford 2016 Rose of Pinot Noir (Sta. Rita Hills)

description: A subdued nose gives mere hints of ripe, yellow Mirabelle plums. The palate conveys a little more of this lovely fruit on the slender, easy and almost juicy palate. A zesty core and some spritz add to the freshness and verve of this zippy, dry and sprightly wine.
title: Gruber Röschitz 2016 Grüner Veltliner (Weinviertel)

description: A salty hint of yeast and fresh, green apple and pear appear on the nose. The slender palate is enlivened by lemon brightness and slight spritz. Cheeky green fruit and white pepper tingle everywhere, making for an easy but refreshing drink.
title: The Dot 2016 Austrian Pepper Grüner Veltliner (Niederösterreich)

description: Peach and blossom notes abound on this delightfully fresh fruity wine. Its sunny stone-fruit flavors are concentrated and juicy, balanced against zesty lime acidity and a meandering pollen finish. Sprightly in texture yet buoyant.
title: Keuka Spring 2016 Semi Dry Riesling (Finger Lakes)

description: Lifted lime and lemon notes appear on the shy nose, edged with soy spice. The palate follows with ripe, beautifully drawn pear fruit and even more yeasty, savory miso. Texturally this has a creamy lick and sleek midpalate concentration. The long, lovely finish brings out earthiness, pear peel and hints of lovage and chervil.
title: Geyerhof 2016 Hoher Rain Grüner Veltliner (Kremstal)

description: Harsh, grassy, weedy berry aromas mix with a heavy amount of clove. In the mouth, this is screechy and way off balance. A clove-heavy flavor profile is oaky and messy on Kaiken's entry-level Malbec.
title: Kaiken 2016 Reserva Malbec (Mendoza)

description: Appetizing notes of Cox Orange Pippin and ripe red apples with lemon zest make up the nose of this fruity wine. The palate gives them full rein, adding a funky tone of yeast. This wine is characterized by intense, refreshing juiciness that ripples across the palate in fruity abandon. It's dry and refreshing.
title: Wieninger 2016 Riesling (Vienna)

description: Exotic fruit, honeysuckle and apple aromas commingle on the nose of this wine. The palate is less expressive, offering simple, faint white peach and citrus notes, with crisp acidity. It finishes fresh and clean.
title: Monte Zovo 2016  Soave

description: This is simple, light and fruity wine. Blending two naturally herbal grapes, it is tangy, zesty and has light final acidity. Drink this lively wine now.
title: Producteurs Plaimont 2016 Echo Indigo Colombard-Sauvignon Blanc (Côtes de Gascogne)

description: Candied fruit aromas combine with fresh, jammy strawberry and cherry flavors for a light, almost sweet impression in this bright pink wine.
title: LangeTwins 2016 Estate Grown Rosé Sangiovese (Lodi)

description: This is one of the vintage's knockout rosés, thanks in part to the Grenache and Gamay grapes that make up the blend. It's pale pink in color, with supple lime pith, strawberry, chalk and melon aromas. The palate is tense with structure, its bubblegum and lemon peel flavors riding a wave of acidity that persists long into the finish.
title: Joyce 2016 Turbidity Current Rosé (Monterey County)

description: Intense aromas of cran-grape juice, violets, lavender and cinnamon dominate the nose. The flavors are tart and floral, while the texture is smooth and easy with a fresh acidity. This finishes long and bright on a touch of sour cherry.
title: Veramar 2016 JB Ameritage Red (Virginia)

description: Soft and ripe, this caramel-flavored wine has hints of strawberries. Drink now.
title: Château Mémoires 2016 Rosé (Bordeaux Rosé)

description: Made entirely with the native grape Bombino Nero, this informal light-bodied wine has subdued aromas of wild cherry and a hint of crushed herb. The aromas carry over to the über-simple palate along with a hint of pink grapefruit.
title: Rivera 2016 Rosé (Castel del Monte)

description: This is a ripe, spicy wine with concentrated white and citrus fruits. It is richly textured and tangy, with an intense, crisp aftertaste. The wine will be ready to drink from 2018.
title: Espaço Rural 2016 Dornas Branco White (Alentejano)

description: Aromas of white wild flower and exotic fruit spring from the glass. The lively fruity palate doles out honeydew melon and juicy grapefruit alongside bright acidity.
title: Colosi 2016 Grillo (Terre Siciliane)

description: Peachy aromas come with an oily essence. This basic Chardonnay feels plump and generic, with a shot of zesty acidity. Slightly salty melon and peach flavors don't change much on the finish.
title: Haras de Pirque 2016 Reserva Chardonnay (Maipo Valley)

description: This simple fruity wine is perfumed and attractively fragrant. With a blend that includes the unusual Perrum grape (also known as Pedro Ximenez in the Sherry region of Spain), it is smooth, refreshingly creamy and ready to drink.
title: Herdade do Esporão 2016 Alandra Branco White (Portuguese Table Wine)

description: A satisfying marriage between Chardonnay and Arinto has produced a rich wood-aged wine. With its spice, creamy texture and plentiful acidity, the wine is full and rich from lees aging in the barrel. This is a young wine, dry and crisp and worth aging. Drink from late 2018.
title: Encostas de Estremoz 2016 Esperança Reserva White (Alentejano)

description: The aromas are exuberant, with notes of lime, orange zest, ripe peach and flowers. The palate, as advertised, is bone dry with stone-fruit flavors that show crystalline clarity and linger on the finish that features plenty of lime accents.
title: Columbia Crest 2016 Reserve Dry Riesling (Yakima Valley)

description: A mix of tropical fruit, peach pit and apple aromas lead to a sold palate. Basic white-fruit flavors suggest pineapple and a skins-based note of bitterness that persists on the finish. Drink now.
title: Garzón 2016 Reserva Albariño (Uruguay)

description: Very lean in mouthfeel and very dry and light in flavor, this refreshing wine adds cucumber flavors to lemon zest aromas. It's light in body, crisp and tangy in texture.
title: J Vineyards & Winery 2016 Pinot Gris (California)
